rawAssistant: Rumors have it that the wardstones here in Lantern Marsh began to stir after a particularly violent flood, sending shards of ancient knowledge tumbling out into the open. It seems our very own Hollowfen, normally so still and calm, was the catalyst for this particular event – one that has brought a renewed wave of interest from those seeking to unravel the secrets hidden within these ruins.
